title: Sahara AI Connect Party
summary: A flagship Korea Blockchain Week evening for Sahara AI on Seoul's Sebit Island — produced end to end by PROOF.

sections.p: Sahara AI wanted to make a real impression at Korea Blockchain Week — not just another side event lost in a crowded week. The goal was an evening that the right people would remember and talk about.

PROOF produced the event end to end on Seoul's Sebit Island: venue, production, AV, staging and the pacing of the night. We managed a thousand guests through an evening designed so people actually stayed, mixed and talked — rather than drifting in and out.
The room held. Guests stayed and connected, and multiple global partners called it the best event of the week — the kind of result that doesn't happen by luck, but by intentional production.

quote.text: Three global partners told us it was the best event of the week. That doesn't happen by luck.

title: Seoul Meta Week
summary: PROOF's own flagship Web3 summit at COEX, Seoul — full conference production, every edition since the first.

sections.p: Seoul Meta Week is our own intellectual property — a flagship summit we conceived and have run from its first edition. The mandate every year: a blockchain conference people actually fly in for.

Full conference production at COEX — program design, speaker curation, sponsor fulfilment, stage, AV and the entire on-site operation. As the owner-operator, we control the experience end to end, edition after edition.
A returning, growing flagship. The speaker lineup gets stronger each year because the event experience backs it up — the institutional muscle that turns a conference into a destination.

quote.text: Institutional muscle that turns a blockchain conference into something people actually fly in for.

title: TOKEN2049 Side Event
summary: A sponsor side event during TOKEN2049 Singapore — venue, vendors and on-site execution in a city the client didn't operate in.

sections.p: A Korean Web3 project needed a sponsor side event during TOKEN2049 in Singapore — a city they had no operating footprint in. They had shortlisted agencies; two of them had never actually run an event in Singapore before.

Because we already held the venue contacts, AV vendors and staffing relationships, we moved fast. Briefed on a Monday, we had a confirmed venue by Wednesday, then handled vendors, AV and on-site execution through the event. This was a side event during TOKEN2049 — not the conference itself.
The client got certainty in an unfamiliar city, on a deadline, during one of the busiest weeks of the Web3 calendar. No improvising on the fly.

quote.text: We briefed them on Monday and had a confirmed venue by Wednesday. For us, that certainty was everything.

title: Aggregation Summit
summary: Full production for the Aggregation Summit — a global Web3 summit delivered under the PROOF standard.

sections.p: A global Web3 summit that needed a production partner who could run the room at conference scale.
Full production — stage, AV, program support and on-site operations — delivered to the same standard as our owned summits.
